scripts.start-electron-dev: node scripts/clean-dev.js && set MESOBUILDER_EXTERNAL_PATH=%CD% && set MESOBUILDER_CLEAR_CACHE=1 && npx electron --js-flags="--max-old-space-size=4096" .
scripts.start-electron-pro: node scripts/clean-dev.js && npm run package-win && start dist\MesoBuilder-win32-x64\MesoBuilder.exe
scripts.clean-cache: npm cache clean --force && npm cache verify
